testcase.name: test_pink_singer_search

failure.message:
AssertionError: Pink (singer) should be A-list, got D - BUG: DB has incorrect tier assert 'D' == 'A'
- A + D

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22_tier_price_consistency.py:172: in test_pink_singer_search assert tier == "A", f"Pink (singer) should be A-list, got {tier} - BUG: DB has incorrect tier" E AssertionError: Pink (singer) should be A-list, got D - BUG: DB has incorrect tier E assert 'D' == 'A' E E - A E + D

testcase.name: test_daniel_radcliffe_search

failure.message:
AssertionError: Daniel Radcliffe should be A-list, got B assert 'B' == 'A'
- A + B

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_22_tier_price_consistency.py:190: in test_daniel_radcliffe_search assert tier == "A", f"Daniel Radcliffe should be A-list, got {tier}" E AssertionError: Daniel Radcliffe should be A-list, got B E assert 'B' == 'A' E E - A E + B
